title: Tower PT20087WHT 2-Slice Toaster with 6 Browning Levels, Cancel Setting, Removable Crumb Tray, 650W, Black
features: 6 BROWNING LEVELS: Make your preferred toast with 6 different browning settings for the perfect taste and texture
CANCEL SETTING: Easy to use controls allow you to cancel toasting at any time
REMOVABLE CRUMB TRAY: Installed with a removable tray to catch fallen crumbs and make it easier to dispose of mess
NON-SLIP FEET: Non-slip feet keep the toast stable and secure on the worktop for added safety
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Make the perfect toast every time with Tower Enjoy your toast, crumpets and bagels exactly how you like them with the Tower 2-slice toaster. Featuring 6 browning settings, it gives you more control over the toasting time so you can select the right texture to suit your taste. Complete with an anti-jam function to prevent toast, bagels and other snacks from getting stuck, the toaster requires a simple wipe clean with a damp cloth to keep it in pristine condition. Powerful toaster features 6 browning settings so you can enjoy your toast with the right consistency and texture Cancel function lets you stop toasting at any time Integrated cord storage keeps wires out of the way Anti-slip feet keep the toaster stable on the countertop A cool touch handle protects you from burns CANCEL SETTING Allows you to cancel toasting at any time 6 BROWING LEVELS 6 adjustable browning levels for varied results on toast, bagels and crumpets REMOVABLE CRUMB TRAY Removable crumb tray for less mess

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti-Slip Base, Cancel Function, LED Indicator, Removable Crumb Tray, Variable Browning Control
